root_summary: Choose between machine-learning tools and reproducibility presets.
tools_summary: Main machine-learning tools. Select one to configure and run.
presets_summary: Browse reproducibility presets for machine learning.

tools.name: Standard Machine Learning
tools.description: Train and benchmark cross-sectional estimators for trajectory-based datasets.
tools.node_summary: Run standard (cross-sectional) machine-learning estimators, list estimators/metrics, and generate reproducible artifacts.
tools.subtitle: Run standard ML workflows on cross-sectional trajectory datasets. Press Esc to exit.

tools.name: Longitudinal Machine Learning
tools.description: Train and evaluate longitudinal estimators with preset, suffix-inferred, or manual feature-group setup.
tools.node_summary: Run longitudinal machine-learning estimators on wide-format datasets with flexible feature-group and non-longitudinal feature selection.
tools.subtitle: Run longitudinal ML workflows on wide-format datasets. Press Esc to exit.

tools.name: Benchmark Standard ML
tools.description: Benchmark standard estimators under one shared protocol.
tools.node_summary: Benchmark standard estimators and export ranking/report artifacts with optional reproducibility notebooks.
tools.subtitle: Benchmark standard ML estimators under one protocol. Press Esc to exit.

tools.name: Benchmark Longitudinal ML
tools.description: Benchmark longitudinal estimators with preset, suffix-inferred, or manual feature-group setup.
tools.node_summary: Benchmark longitudinal estimators and export ranking/report artifacts using flexible feature-group and non-longitudinal feature selection.
tools.subtitle: Benchmark longitudinal ML estimators under one protocol. Press Esc to exit.

tools.name: Benchmark Standard and Longitudinal ML
tools.description: Benchmark standard and longitudinal estimators in one mixed suite, including flexible longitudinal feature-group setup.
tools.node_summary: Run mixed benchmark workflows across standard and longitudinal estimators with unified ranking artifacts and flexible longitudinal grouping.
tools.subtitle: Benchmark standard + longitudinal estimators together. Press Esc to exit.

tools.name: SHAP Analysis
tools.description: Generate SHAP explainability figures and feature-importance artifacts.
tools.node_summary: Run SHAP explainability on a saved model artifact and export report/plot assets.
tools.subtitle: Generate SHAP explainability artifacts from a saved model and dataset. Press Esc to exit.

presets.name: Model MCS by LEAP
presets.description: (incoming) Reproduce LEAP machine-learning experiments for the Millennium Cohort Study.
